channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

1. Mario Kart World Has Been Updated To Version 1.6.0, Here Are The Full Patch Notes  Nintendo Life
  2. Free update adds Bob-omb Blast to Battle mode in Mario Kart World  Nintendo
  3. Nintendo's Changing Mario Kart World Again, Rebalancing Items and Adding Bob-omb Blast Battle Mode  IGN
  4. New Mario Kart World update adds fan-favorite mode after Nintendo spoiled it earlier this month  Polygon.com
  5. Mario Kart World 1.6.0: Stability and Balance - Nintendo "Fine-Tunes" Its Main Racing Game  IXBT.games

item.description:

item.title: Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale - The Verge
item.description:
1. Amazon is offering up to 50 percent off chargers from Anker and others for its Big Spring Sale  The Verge
  2. Best charger deal: Pick up this Anker Nano charger for its lowest price yet in Amazon's spring sale  Mashable
  3. Anker's New Prime 3-in-1 Foldable Charging Station Hits $104.99 Low Price on Amazon  MacRumors
  4. Anker 160W Laptop Charger Briefly Returns to Black Friday Pricing in a Last-Minute Amazon Spring Sale Deal  Gizmodo
  5. Double Up With This Baseus 45-Watt Charger and Cable 2-Pack for Just $24  AOL.com

item.title: ASUS reveals pricing for ROG Zephyrus G-series with Panther Lake, users: “They have lost their minds” - VideoCardz.com
